'''dagadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacclimatization|reacclimatization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacclimatization|reacclimatization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dagadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægædhæth|dægædhæth]] || [[word:dægædhæj|dægædhæj]] || [[word:dægædhæsh|dægædhæsh]] || [[word:dægædhæ|dægædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dagagadhath|dagagadhath]] || [[word:dagagadhaj|dagagadhaj]] || [[word:dagagadhash|dagagadhash]] || [[word:dagagadha|dagagadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dagadhath|dagadhath]] || [[word:dagadhaj|dagadhaj]] || [[word:dagadhash|dagadhash]] || [[word:dagadha|dagadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagafdhath|dagafdhath]] || [[word:dagafdhaj|dagafdhaj]] || [[word:dagafdhash|dagafdhash]] || [[word:dagafdhaf|dagafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dagadhatha|dagadhatha]] || [[word:dagadhaja|dagadhaja]] || [[word:dagadhasha|dagadhasha]] || [[word:dagadhaka|dagadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dagadhath|dagadhath]] || [[word:dagadhaj|dagadhaj]] || [[word:dagadhash|dagadhash]] || [[word:dagadha|dagadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dagadhathal|dagadhathal]] || [[word:dagadhajal|dagadhajal]] || [[word:dagadhashal|dagadhashal]] || [[word:dagadhakal|dagadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dagadhathatha|dagadhathatha]] || [[word:dagadhajaja|dagadhajaja]] || [[word:dagadhashasha|dagadhashasha]] || [[word:dagadhaka|dagadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dagadhathan|dagadhathan]] || [[word:dagadhajan|dagadhajan]] || [[word:dagadhashan|dagadhashan]] || [[word:dagadhakan|dagadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dagadhathaoro|dagadhathaoro]] || [[word:dagadhajaoro|dagadhajaoro]] || [[word:dagadhashaoro|dagadhashaoro]] || [[word:dagadhakaoro|dagadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
